name: PACIFIC HEALTH CARE ORGANIZATION INC
business: PACIFIC HEALTH CARE ORGANIZATION INC provides workers' compensation cost containment services including health care organization (HCO) and medical provider network (MPN) management, medical bill review, utilization review, medical case management, employee advocate services, workers' compensation carve-outs, Medicare set-aside services, and expert witness testimony. Its customers are primarily California employers, insurers, third-party administrators, and municipalities.

exposures.sentence: We are workers compensation cost containment specialists providing a range of services principally to California employers and claims administrators.
